name: db-guard
description: Two-layer guard against unauthorized DROP TABLE, TRUNCATE, DROP DATABASE, DROP SCHEMA, and DROP COLUMN. A PreToolUse hook blocks direct Bash calls; the /db-drop skill is the investigation-first sanctioned path with per-step confirmation.

plugins.name: db-guard
plugins.description: Provides the /db-drop skill — the sanctioned investigation-first path through the db-guard hook. Walks each stage of a destructive SQL operation with explicit confirmation at every step.
